calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing Of Request For Court Judgment By Default
Off Calendar Jul-31-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Clerk: s.Vantree CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Ernst Halperin, Assistant District Attorney appears on behalf of the People.
Investigator Zach Gorton, witness sworn, but does not testify.
James Stewart, defendant appears but is advises by the Court that he will not be able to participatre in the hearing as it is a default hearing.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters final judgment and permanate injunction as follows:
SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-19-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
